Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to generate 20 open ended thought provoking questions based on the complex supply chain process described

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The questions should discover insights potential issues strategies for implications etc They should not be yes no but open

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to ensure we follow the policy Its about supply chain no disallowed content Its fine

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user wants a list of questions not SQL So we can output bullet points

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets think about possible questions

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How does the company manage the complexity of coordinating multiple international suppliers with varying lead times and quality metrics

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What strategies can be employed to improve visibility and traceability of components across the supply chain

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: How can the company mitigate risks associated with geopolitical tensions or trade restrictions affecting suppliers in Taiwan Japan South Korea Germany and the US

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What are the implications of using just in time replenishment for high demand markets versus aggregated monthly shipments for slower markets

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How does the company balance cost optimization with the need for rapid responsiveness and product availability across different regions

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What role do digital systems and data analytics play in real time decision making for production scheduling demand planning and inventory management

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How can the company ensure compliance with diverse regulatory frameworks and environmental standards across all markets

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What are the challenges of coordinating multimodal transportation air freight vs cargo ships to meet delivery windows while controlling costs

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How does the company manage currency fluctuations and exchange rate risks across its global operations

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What strategies could be implemented to reduce the carbon footprint of the supply chain without significantly increasing costs

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How does the company handle product recalls and after sales support across multiple regions with different consumer protection laws

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: What are the implications of having a 24 7 manufacturing operation in Malaysia on labor practices worker safety and shift scheduling

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How can the company improve collaboration with logistics partners to streamline customs insurance and regulatory compliance

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: What are the trade offs between centralizing distribution centers versus having more regional or local warehouses

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How does the company leverage predictive analytics and machine learning to improve demand forecasting accuracy

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What are the potential bottlenecks in the current process that could lead to stockouts or excess inventory and how can they be identified

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How can the company better integrate supplier quality metrics into its own quality assurance protocols

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: What are the risks associated with depending on a limited number of key suppliers for critical components and how can diversification be achieved

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How does the company manage warranty claims and returns across different markets and what impact does it have on reverse logistics

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What emerging technologies eg blockchain IoT autonomous vehicles could be adopted to enhance transparency security and efficiency in this supply chain

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We can refine each to be more open ended

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The user wants 20 Lets list them in bullet form with numbers

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Make sure they are thought provoking and open ended
